name: Chocochip Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugars until well blended.
3. Beat in the eggs, milk, and vanilla.
4. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt until combined.
5. Mix in the oats, chocolate chips, and nuts.
6. Form dough into 1-inch balls and place on a greased or parchment-lined baking sheet.
7. Bake for 9-10 minutes for chewy cookies, or 12-13 minutes for crispy cookies.
8. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
